# Is 3D Touched

**Menu:** `Actions/Object/Queries`

**Serialized name:** `Is3DTouchedBranch`

**Source class:** `C:/Users/Lucas/AndroidStudioProjects/ITsMagic/ITsMagicEngine V2/app/src/main/java/com/itsmagic/engine/Engines/Engine/NoCode/Nodes/Actions/ObjectRelated/Queries/Is3DTouchedBranchNode.java`

## Purpose

Checks the condition `3D Touched` and routes the flow based on the result.
